decks.notes: The main idea of this deck revolves around utilizing Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful combo that overwhelms the opponent. The deck includes various support cards such as Fatal Push, Thoughtseize, and Vanishing Verse to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of Monument to Endurance provides additional protection and resilience to the combo pieces. Overall, the deck focuses on setting up the combo pieces efficiently while maintaining control of the game through removal and disruption spells.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's resources through disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Duress while gradually building up card advantage with Yorion as a companion. It aims to maintain board control with a mix of removal spells and counterspells, utilizing cards like Fatal Push and Stormchaser's Talent. The deck also includes some card draw and recursion options to ensure consistency and resilience in long game scenarios. Overall, the strategy revolves around out-valuing the opponent and shutting down their game plan to secure a victory.

Utilize a wide range of control cards and removals to maintain board presence and disrupt opponent's strategies, while also generating card advantage and value through Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion. Utilize a diverse mana base to support all the different colors needed for the deck's strategy, while also including powerful cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to disrupt opponent's game plan. The deck aims to outvalue and outplay the opponent by controlling the game tempo and leveraging its resources efficiently.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on playing efficient creatures and disrupting opponents with cards like Archon of Emeria, Thalia, Guardian of Thraben, and Skyclave Apparition. By utilizing cards like Collected Company and Elvish Mystic, the deck aims to quickly flood the board with threats and overwhelm opponents before they can establish their game plan. The inclusion of Michelangelo's Technique and Boseiju, Who Endures adds additional versatility and resilience to the deck, allowing for multiple lines of play to adapt to different matchups.

This deck focuses on assembling the combo of Greasefang and Parhelion II to generate powerful synergies and overwhelm the opponent. It includes cards to protect the combo pieces, disrupt the opponent's strategy, and provide additional support and utility. The deck aims to quickly set up its combo while controlling the board and maintaining a strong presence. It combines elements of graveyard interaction, creature synergy, and removal to create a versatile and resilient strategy that can adapt to different matchups and outmaneuver opponents.

This deck focuses on combining Greasefang and Parhelion II to create a powerful synergy that can overwhelm opponents quickly. By utilizing support cards like Fleeting Spirit and Monument to Endurance, as well as disruption tools like Thoughtseize and Vanishing Verse, the deck aims to control the board and protect its combo pieces. The inclusion of Iron-Shield Elf and Guardian of New Benalia provides additional ways to protect and support the combo, while cards like Brightclimb Pathway and Geier Reach Sanitarium offer flexibility in mana usage and card advantage. Ultimately, the deck aims to assemble its key pieces and outmaneuver opponents to secure victory.

This Jund Aggro deck focuses on sacrificing creatures for value with cards like Witch's Oven and Mayhem Devil. It also utilizes Bloodtithe Harvester and Deadly Dispute to generate card advantage while putting pressure on the opponent. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Fatal Push and The Meathook Massacre, while also presenting a fast clock with aggressive creatures like Cauldron Familiar and Ygra, Eater of All. The inclusion of Fable of the Mirror-Breaker allows for additional card draw and consistency in the deck's game plan.

The focus of this deck is to establish an aggressive game plan with the combination of cheap, efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, along with burn spells like Fiery Impulse and Reckless Rage to clear the way for attacks. The deck also utilizes card draw and manipulation to maintain pressure and maximize damage output, with cards like Consider and Stormchaser's Talent. By maintaining a fast pace and keeping up pressure on the opponent, the deck aims to close out games quickly before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the combo between Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to create a powerful board presence. The deck focuses on controlling the game with cards like Fatal Push, Thoughtseize, and Guardian of New Benalia, while also generating value with Iron-Shield Elf and Monument to Endurance. The combination of these cards allows for strong synergy and the potential for explosive plays. The mana base is optimized for consistency and the inclusion of support cards like Sheltered by Ghosts and Bleachbone Verge enhances the overall strategy of the deck.

This deck focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent by utilizing aggressive creatures and burn spells. The key strategy is to control the board with creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, while also dealing direct damage with spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage. Den of the Bugbear and Kumano Faces Kakkazan provide additional threats, and creatures like Emberheart Challenger and Sunspine Lynx can help push through damage. The aim is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient attacks and burn spells to secure a victory before they can stabilize.

The deck revolves around utilizing Lotus Field to generate a large amount of mana quickly, allowing for explosive plays with cards like Scapeshift and Terror of the Peaks. The deck also includes various ways to protect its key pieces and ramp up to its powerful combo potential. The goal is to quickly assemble the necessary cards to create an overwhelming advantage and overwhelm the opponent before they have a chance to respond effectively.

Creating a powerful combo strategy with Greasefang and Parhelion II by utilizing cards like Iron-Shield Elf, Guardian of New Benalia, and Fleeting Spirit to maintain control and disrupt opponents. Thoughtseize and Fatal Push provide additional control, while Monument to Endurance and The Mycosynth Gardens offer support for the combo pieces. The deck also includes lands that support the strategy with Concealed Courtyard and Godless Shrine, as well as options for card draw and versatility with cards like Geier Reach Sanitarium and Brightclimb Pathway.

The deck focuses on using control elements to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining card advantage through draw spells and card filtering. It also includes a companion card that provides additional synergy with the deck. The deck aims to stall the game until it can establish a dominant board presence with powerful creatures and planeswalkers, supported by removal spells and counterspells to protect its threats. Additionally, the deck includes lands that provide utility and allow for flexibility in its mana base.

This aggressive Red Deck Wins archetype focuses on quickly dealing damage to the opponent by utilizing low-cost creatures and burn spells. Cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage benefit from spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage to efficiently remove blockers and push damage through. Den of the Bugbear and Ramunap Ruins provide additional reach in the late game, while Kumano Faces Kakkazan and Screaming Nemesis offer additional threats against opposing creatures. The deck aims to maintain pressure and end the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck is built around fast-paced aggressive play, utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to apply pressure on the opponent. The key strategy is to quickly build up a board presence with efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, while also disrupting the opponent with spells like Burst Lightning and Reckless Rage. The deck aims to maintain tempo and control the board by utilizing card draw and bounce effects to keep the pressure on, ultimately overwhelming the opponent before they can stabilize.

The central theme of this deck is to control the board and disrupt your opponent's strategy using a combination of removal spells like Abrupt Decay and Fatal Push, along with hand disruption cards like Thoughtseize and Duress. The deck also includes powerful creatures like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Graveyard Trespasser to apply pressure on the opponent. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's strategy while also providing enough consistency in casting spells. Overall, the deck focuses on grinding out incremental advantages and outvaluing the opponent to secure a win.
